objections.objection_text: If I let this relationship go, God might never provide another one as good.
objections.underlying_belief: Scarcity mindset and lack of trust in God's abundance. Believing that a 'good enough' comfort is safer than the 'best' God has.
objections.counter_truth_angle: God is the source of abundance; trust in Him attracts right relationships rather than clutching to wrong ones.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: Fear that God will not provide. Fear that, oh, if I let Lydia go, there will never be another one.

objections.objection_text: I need to understand the plan perfectly before I act (Analysis Paralysis).
objections.underlying_belief: My safety comes from my own understanding/control rather than from obedience.
objections.underlying_fear: Making a mistake that can't be fixed.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Lean not on your own understanding; jump where God points even without the full roadmap.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: Just go where the fear is... the Proverbs literally says, do not lean on your own understanding. Just trust God.
